text.description: Text to convert to speech (max 40,000 characters).
text.title: Text

voice.description: Voice to use for speech generation.
voice.title: Voice

model.description: Model to use. multilingual_v2 is highest quality, turbo/flash are faster with lower latency.
model.title: Model

output_format.description: Audio output format. mp3_44100_128 is standard quality MP3.
output_format.title: Output Format

stability.description: Voice stability (0-1). Higher = more consistent, lower = more expressive.
stability.title: Stability

similarity_boost.description: Similarity boost (0-1). Higher = closer to original voice.
similarity_boost.title: Similarity Boost

style.description: Style exaggeration (0-1). Increases expressiveness but may reduce stability.
style.title: Style

use_speaker_boost.description: Enable speaker boost for enhanced clarity.
use_speaker_boost.title: Use Speaker Boost
